narrative:
Precinct Norwich (precinct in Muskingum County) has 778 registered voters, with 48.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.9 percentage points.
